actions.name: Set checked
actions.description: If Type is Checkbox, set the current check state of the control.

actions.name: Set text
actions.description: Set the text on the button face.

actions.name: Set tooltip
actions.description: Set the text that appears for the button tooltip. Leave blank for no tooltip.

actions.name: Toggle checked
actions.description: If Type is Checkbox, toggles the check state of the control.

conditions.name: Is checked
conditions.description: If Type is Checkbox, is true if the control is currently checked.

conditions.name: On clicked
conditions.description: Triggered when the user pushes the button or checks/unchecks the control, either by keyboard, mouse or touch input.
